data.current_description: Return a list of published articles, ordered by descending publish date.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve published articles with filtering and pagination
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of published articles ordered by descending publish date. Supports filtering by tags, username, and other criteria through query parameters. Returns an array of ArticleSummary objects. Supports pagination via page and per_page parameters.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal and doesn't explain the 9 available parameters or pagination support. Enhanced version clarifies filtering capabilities, pagination, and return type to help AI agents understand filtering and pagination options available.

message: Operation 'createArticle' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks detail about what the request body contains, what is returned, and the side effect of immediate publication. Enhanced version clarifies input structure, return value, publication behavior, and authentication requirement for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Create a new article. Requires authentication.
data.summary_suggestion: Create a new published article
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new article for the authenticated user. Accepts article content via CreateArticleRequest body. Returns the created Article object with generated ID and metadata. The article is immediately published and becomes visible to other users. Requires valid API key authentication.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about what the request body contains, what is returned, and the side effect of immediate publication. Enhanced version clarifies input structure, return value, publication behavior, and authentication requirement for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'updateArticle' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too vague about what can be updated, authorization rules, and whether partial updates are supported. Enhanced version clarifies authorization (author-only), input structure, return value, and partial update support for AI agents to understand update semantics.

data.current_description: Update an existing article. Requires authentication.
data.summary_suggestion: Update an existing article
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing article identified by ID. Accepts updated article content via CreateArticleRequest body. Returns the updated Article object. Only the authenticated article author can update their own articles. Supports partial updates - only provided fields are modified. Changes are immediately reflected in published content.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about what can be updated, authorization rules, and whether partial updates are supported. Enhanced version clarifies authorization (author-only), input structure, return value, and partial update support for AI agents to understand update semantics.
